description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/security_config.json to drop the wildcard '*' from allow_origins, keeping only the explicit https://app.example.com origin, while allow_credentials stays true. check_cors.py then finds no violation and exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_cors.py: allow_credentials is true while allow_origins contains the wildcard '*'. Removing the wildcard and keeping the explicit real origin. Not touching the checker.
interactions.notes: The fix — check_cors.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
